## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new example plugin
- [ ] Workflow / prompt update
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / build / tooling
- [ ] MCP server change

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally for any plugin I touched (`cmake --build build --config Release`)
- [ ] `pluginval --strictness-level 5` is clean (if a plugin's audio behavior changed)
- [ ] `ctest` passes (if the plugin has a `tests/` directory)
- [ ] No secrets, signing identities, or Apple Team IDs committed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `WORKFLOW.md`, `prompts/`, `rules/`)
